case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. MARTHA COVARRUBIAS et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED OCT-09-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COVARRUBIAS, MARTHA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-09-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-09-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
